---
title: "tidyverse_script"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-03"
---

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

# A silly R program
# This is the first program that Professor Maloof asked us to write in R

```{r hello_world2}
print("Hello World")
```


#import file

```{r} 
heightdata<-read.csv("C:/Users/norba/Downloads/height_data_clean.csv")
```

#filter for specific date data and group by pop
```{r}

# Load the dataset
heightdata <- read.csv("C:/Users/norba/Downloads/height_data_clean.csv")
```


# Check column names to ensure they match exactly and convert date to date format
```{r}
colnames(heightdata)
heightdata$survey_date <- as.Date(heightdata$survey_date, format = "%Y-%m-%d")

```

# Filter data for January 27, 2023 and calculate average

```{r}
heightdata_filtered <- heightdata %>%
  filter(survey_date == "2023-01-27") %>%
  group_by(pop) %>%
  summarize(ave_height_cm = mean(height_cm, na.rm = TRUE))

heightdata_filtered
```
